page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9ae.12xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing the AMD EPYC 9T95 processor running at a base clock speed of 2.25 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each of the 48 vCPUs maps directly to a physical core, ensuring dedicated execution resources without simultaneous multithreading overhead.

The instance is equipped with 192.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for operating system and data storage needs. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps, facilitating reliable data transfer rates for distributed environments.

From a resource density perspective, the dedicated core allocation provides predictable compute performance, making it a qualitatively cost-efficient choice for workloads that require stable CPU execution without the performance variability of shared-core or hyperthreaded environments. The balanced memory-to-vCPU ratio and 25 Gbps network baseline make this instance type suitable for general-purpose workloads, including web serving, application servers, containerized microservices, and medium-scale enterprise applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9ae.12xlarge is a general-purpose instance configured with 48 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing the AMD EPYC 9T95 processor at 2.25 GHz. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, the instance features a 1.0 thread-per-core design, providing dedicated compute resources without simultaneous multithreading. It is equipped with 192.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core ratio. The instance does not include local storage, relying entirely on network-attached storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 25 Gbps. This hardware profile delivers predictable compute performance and balanced resource density, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for enterprise applications. It is suited for workloads such as web serving, application hosting, containerized deployments, and general-purpose business applications requiring consistent CPU performance.

tagline: A dedicated 48-core AMD EPYC instance with balanced memory and 25 Gbps networking for predictable general-purpose enterprise workloads.

192 GB of system memory providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio
25 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for reliable data transfer
KVM hypervisor-based virtualization with zero local storage
Suited for web serving, application hosting, and containerized microservices
